name: Jamf Mobile Devices Without Screen Lock
description: Identifies Jamf-managed mobile devices without a compliant passcode
query: SELECT id, name, user_email, os_version FROM jamf_mobile_devices WHERE COALESCE(passcode_present, false) = false OR COALESCE(passcode_compliant, false) = false
remediation: Enforce a device passcode and screen lock timeout through Jamf configuration profiles.
